top_signals.title: Samsung Scores Profit Beat Due to Runaway Demand for AI Memory
top_signals.summary: Samsung Electronics Co.’s quarterly profit surged 19-fold, soaring past elevated expectations due to rocketing demand for memory chips needed in AI data centers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Graham Platner denies sex assault claim as Democrats urge him to quit Maine Senate race
top_signals.summary: Graham Platner hopes to unseat Republican Sen. Susan Collins, but the Democrat's campaign is reeling from a bombshell allegation by Jenny Racicot.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
